title: どうか、脚よ止まらないで

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way back to the academy after a shopping trip, I see a Tracen
student in front of me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Phew... Okay, break time's over.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I need to hurry back... and move on to the next training exercise.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You can do this, Rice! Believe in yourself... Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower runs with a strong spring to her step. The aura she
possesses in spite of her small build piques my curiosity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Entranced by her running form, I continue following her down the
road towards the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She gets stopped by a red light...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And another red light...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
How many red lights is this now?! Today is definitely not her lucky
day...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up waiting at every single crosswalk, so by the time we finally
arrive at Tracen Academy, the sun has already long set.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: No big deal. I wasn't in a rush or anythi—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um... I-I'm so sorry!
choice_data_list: Huh? Are you talking to me?
Huh? Are you talking to me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-that's right. Um... I'm r-really...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I mean... It only took you this long to come back to the academy
because I was running next to you the whole time...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm so, so sorry!
choice_data_list: Don't sweat it, it wasn't y—
Don't sweat it, it wasn't y—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No, it was clearly my fault. I'm a hopeless girl who only brings
misfortune upon everyone...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So let me apologize... D-don't worry! If I leave, everything will be
fine! Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower dashes off without giving me a chance to stop her... I
feel bad for making her worry so much about me.
choice_data_list:
(I need to go tell her she was just overthinking
things!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I head off in the same direction as Rice Shower.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Uuugh. I wonder if the person just now was okay being this late.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
What if they were really, really hungry... Or what if they missed the
newest episode of their favorite TV show...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Why am I always like this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seems like she worries an awful lot about other people. Perhaps she
just needs some encourageme—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh, I have to try even harder!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I already made up my mind to enter the upcoming tryouts. I'll actually
enter, actually run, and then...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll make my debut and win a bunch of races. Then, I won't be a
burden anymore!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Mhm... And that means more training! Rice, you can do this! Believe in
yourself...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She suddenly starts training with such intense fervor that I can't bring
myself to interrupt her. Ultimately, I miss my chance to talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower... I'm looking forward to seeing her run at the upcoming
tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it's the day of the tryouts. The venue is filled to the brim with
trainers looking to scout talented runners.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Rice! Ricety-rice-rice! Wherefore art thou, Riiiiice?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class rep, it's my duty to inform you that your race is about to
begin!

text_block_list.name: Tryouts Official A
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O, isn't your race the one after? Make sure you don't
miss your race either!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
So Rice Shower is boycotting even the tryouts now? She has talent,
but it's all going to waste.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She can have all the talent in the world, but if she doesn't want to
race, then that's that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tryouts reach their conclusion, but Rice Shower is nowhere to be
found.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that night, I spot her out of the corner of my eye.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hic... Waaa—waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm such a dumb dummy! I even said I was going to try my very, very
best...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Why... Why am I so worthless?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't just stand by and watch her cry like this, so I walk up and call
out to her.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Y-you're... from the other day?
